codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the requested compose generation behavior (image/ports/runtime/GPU reservation/env/required+optional args), adds serde_yaml, exports the new compose module, and includes broad unit coverage for success and error cases.

issues.description: generate_compose omits --model entirely when model.repo is None. This is outside current validation assertions but can yield an invalid vLLM command for local/non-repo model configurations unless upstream config validation forbids those profiles.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-backend skill requires fail-first TDD for new features, but the worker transcript shows implementation+tests created together and no explicit failing test run before implementation. The procedure may be stricter than observed team practice.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 89ad1b58-aacf-4c42-bd3e-317810d02a42 shows baseline cargo test, then code creation, then passing tests; no red-phase test execution after adding new tests.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, and skill/procedural context. Feature is acceptable overall and meets milestone expectations; one non-blocking edge-case concern was noted.
